# CHAPTER 3

# REVIEW QUESTIONS

Matching. Match the choices from column B with the appropriate statements in column A.

## Column A

1. Smallest filterable infectious agents
2. Classified within the Protista
3. Carry out oxygenic photosynthesis
4. Composed of nucleic acid and a protein coat
5. Single-celled eukaryotic decomposers
6. Cells shaped as rods, spheres, and spirals
7. Filamentous, branched soil organisms
8. Formerly grouped with the blue-green algae
9. Replicate only inside a host cell
10. Used as vectors in genetic engineering

## Column B

(a) Bacteria
(b) Fungi
(c) Viruses
(d) Protozoa
(e) Cyanobacteria

Matching. Match the same column B choices to a second set of statements in column A.

## Column A

1. Outlined against a dark background by nigrosin
2. Replicate only inside a host cell
3. Carry out oxygenic photosynthesis
4. Single-celled eukaryotic decomposers
5. Smallest filterable infectious agents
6. Cells shaped as rods, spheres, and spirals
7. Composed of nucleic acid and a protein coat
8. Classified within the Protista
9. Used as vectors in genetic engineering
10. Filamentous, branched soil organisms
